mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation (repair_id, user_id, score, comment) VALUES (#{repairId}, #{userId}, #{score}, #{comment})
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.repair_id AS repairId, e.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, e.score, e.comment, e.reply, e.reply_time AS replyTime, e.create_time AS createTime FROM evaluation e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE e.repair_id = #{repairId}

SELECT e.id, e.repair_id AS repairId, e.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, e.score, e.comment, e.reply, e.reply_time AS replyTime, e.create_time AS createTime, r.title AS repairTitle FROM evaluation e LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN repair_order r ON e.repair_id = r.id WHERE e.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
